Brady Township, East Brady Borough and Hawthorn Borough polling locations. Have you recently MOVED? Changed your NAME? Or political PARTY affiliation? Update your voter registration information here . Do you want to vote by Mail-In or Absentee Ballot? Fill out the online application here. Clarion County Board of Elections Wayne R. Brosius , Chairman wbrosius@clarioncounty.gov Theodore W. Tharan ttharan@clarioncounty.gov Braxton A. White bwhite@clarioncounty.gov Clarion County Election Staff Robert L. Wilk , Director (814) 226-4000, Ext. 2705 rwilk@clarioncounty.gov Rileigh Huey , Deputy Director (814) 226-4000, Ext. 2006 rhuey@clarioncounty.gov Elections Clarion County Election Department coordinates election and voter registration activities. The office provides information to candidates seeking election. Information includes qualifications to run for office, calendar of events, terms of offices, petitions and instructions, campaign financial reports and instructions, and Statement of Financial Interest Reports. Sample ballots and election results county wide and by precinct are available. - To request a mail-in or absentee ballot, visit pavoterservices.pa.gov . Voter Registration The Voter Registration Department is responsible for assisting individuals in registering to vote. This is done in the office, through the mail, online, through the Department of Transportation and other State agencies. A list of voters in Clarion County listed by precinct and political party (Street Lists) are available by request. - To register to vote or update your record, visit VotesPA.com . - To check your voter registration status, visit pavoterservices.pa.gov . WANT TO HELP ON ELECTION DAY? SERVE YOUR COMMUNITY AS A POLL WORKER. To inquire about this opportunity, call (814) 226-400 0, Ext. 2705 or email rwilk@clarioncounty.gov Contact Information Administrative Building 330 Main Street, Clarion, PA 16214 Hours: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Phone: (814) 226-4000, Ext. 2006 Email: rwilk@clarioncounty.gov Document Center The Document Center provides easy access to public documents.
